summary: This is a brief personal post where Cathy O'Neil shares a video of her 14-year-old son's stand-up comedy performance at the Gotham Comedy Club. She notes that she doesn't typically write about her children but has received explicit permission to share this. The post highlights a proud parent moment, with O'Neil calling out her favorite part: the look her son gives the audience at the end of his set.
key_points: O'Neil breaks from her usual content to share something personal about her family
Her son performed stand-up comedy at a professional venue at age 14
She obtained explicit consent before posting about her child online
money_quotes: I don't usually blog about my kids, but my 14-year-old son has explicitly given me his blessing to post his recent stand-up performance at the Gotham Comedy Club.
key_insight: A rare personal glimpse into O'Neil's family life, showcasing her son's comedy debut with parental pride.
